description_wiki: Austin is one of the 77 officially-designated community areas of Chicago in Illinois, United States.

description: city and county seat of Cook County, and largest city in State of Illinois, United States of America
description_wiki: Chicago is the most populous city in the U.S. state of Illinois and in the Midwestern United States.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Illinois (  IL-ih-NOY) is a state in the Midwestern region of the United States.
Sweden, formally the Kingdom of Sweden, is a Nordic country located on the Scandinavian Peninsula in Northern Europe.
Uppsala ( up-SAH-lə; Swedish: [ˈɵ̂pːˌsɑːla] ; archaically spelled Upsala) is the capital of Uppsala County and the fourth-largest city in Sweden, after Stockholm, Gothenburg, and Malmö.

description: capital and largest city of Sweden
description_wiki: Stockholm (; Swedish: [ˈstɔ̂kː(h)ɔlm] ) is the capital and most populous city of Sweden, as well as the largest urban area in the Nordic countries.

description: city in Los Angeles County, California, United States
description_wiki: Pasadena (  PAS-ə-DEE-nə) is a city in Los Angeles County, California, United States, 10 miles (16 km) northeast of downtown Los Angeles.

description: city in Cook and Kane counties in the northern part of the U.S. state of Illinois
description_wiki: Elgin ( EL-jin) is a city in Cook and Kane counties in the U.S. state of Illinois.

description: village in Cook County, Illinois, United States; suburb of Chicago, Illinois
description_wiki: Oak Park is a village in Cook County, Illinois, United States, adjacent to Chicago.
